Jane Smith
jane.smith@email.com | (555) 123-4567 | linkedin.com/in/janesmith | San Francisco, CA

Summary
Software engineer with 4 years of experience building scalable backend services in Python and Go. Focused on distributed systems and data pipelines.

Experience

Senior Software Engineer | Acme Corp | Jan 2022 – Present | San Francisco, CA
• Designed and implemented a real-time data ingestion pipeline processing 2M events/day using Apache Kafka and Python
• Reduced API latency by 40% by introducing Redis caching layer and optimizing database query patterns
• Led migration of monolithic service to microservices architecture, improving deployment frequency from monthly to daily
• Mentored 3 junior engineers through code reviews and weekly 1:1 sessions

Software Engineer | Beta Systems | Jun 2020 – Dec 2021 | Remote
• Built REST APIs using FastAPI and PostgreSQL serving 50K daily active users
• Implemented automated testing suite (pytest) achieving 85% code coverage
• Collaborated with data science team to deploy ML models via Flask endpoints

Education

B.S. Computer Science | University of California, Berkeley | May 2020

Projects

• Built NLP pipeline using sentence-transformers and scikit-learn to rank resumes against job descriptions
